channel.title: Thief on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.description: Recent content in Thief on Zuluhotel Omega
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2024 Zuluhotel Omega. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: Detecting Hidden
item.description:
Detecting hidden is used to detect traps or hidden players / npcs.

Being specialized thief classe and having higher detect hidden will increase your chances of finding hidden traps/players/npcs and increase the range of your skill.

item.title: Hiding
item.description:
With this skill you can hide and make yourself invisible to other players and NPCs.

You will stay hidden until you move or use a skill or item.

You can’t hide while being too close to a hostile entity, the range from where you can hide from a hostile entity is decreased with skill and being a specialized thief class.

item.title: Lockpicking
item.description:
Lockpicking is used by double-clicking lockpicks and selecting a locked container that you want to lockpick.

Some containers will have different lock difficulties depending how it faces, correct difficulties are showed ingame.

Item Skill required
Barrel 1
Bookshelf 15
Picnic basket 20
Dresser 20
Book shelf 30
Pouch 30
Book shelf 40
Silver chest 40
Box 50
Chest of drawers (Brown) 60
Pouch 60
Small crate 60
Armoire (Brown/Red, closed) 70
Medium crate 70
Large crate 80
Metal chest 90
Globe 90
Wood chest 100
Brass box 110
Strongbox 120
Armoire (Red, open) 125
Chest of drawers (Red) 130
Armoire (Brown, open) 135
Book shelf 140
Writing desk 150

item.title: Poisoning
item.description:
You can use poisoning to poison either weapons, food or bandages.

Poisoning weapons will make it more difficult depending on the damage mod on the weapon.

Poisoned bandages can be used by specialized thiefs to heal.

Poisoned weapons made with the poisoning skill will only poison a target if the attacker is a specialized thief.

Poisoning Difficulties

Poison level Skill required
1 20
2 40
3 60
4 80
5 100
6 120

Extra Weapon Modifier Difficulties

Weapon mod Skill difficulty added
Ruin 5
Might 10
Force 15
Power 20
Vanquishing 25
Devastation 30
GM Weapon 35

item.title: Remove Trap
item.description:
Using remove trap on a trapped container will try to remove the trap.

Remove trap doesn’t have any difficulty ranges.

item.title: Snooping
item.description:
To use snooping you need to double-click a pair of thief gloves then target a npc.

Snooping just allows you to see what a npc is carrying, stealing skill is required to actually steal something.

You can only snoop the same npc every 90 seconds.

Name Skill required
Town person 10
Person 10
Treasure Hunter 40
Gardener 40
Baker 40
Cobbler 40
Barkeeper 40
Animal Trainer 40

item.title: Stealing
item.description:
To steal you will first need to snoop your target and then target the item you want to steal from the snooped container with your stealing ability.

Name Skill required
Town person 10
Person 10
Treasure Hunter 40
Gardener 40
Baker 40
Cobbler 40
Barkeeper 40
Animal Trainer 40

item.title: Stealth
item.description:
The stealth skill allows you to move while being hidden.

To use stealth you will first need to be hidden and have at least 80 hiding.

If you run or use any skill/item while in stealth you will break it and reveal yourself.

The higher stealth skill and specialized thief class you are the longer you can move in stealth.

item.title: Thief
item.description:
Skills

  • Detecting hidden
  • Hiding
  • Lockpicking
  • Poisoning
  • Remove trap
  • Snooping
  • Stealing
  • Stealth

Bonuses

  • Bonuses in all their specialized skills.
  • Deals increased damage with poison.
  • Can poison anything, protections doesn’t work against thief poisons.
  • Gains dexterity quicker.
  • Can use crossbow, heavy crossbow, bow, kryss, short spear, spear, war fork, knife, skinning knife and pitchfork without skill for it, damage and hit chance will check for class level instead.

Penalties

  • Can’t wear ringmail/chainmail/platemail armor or shields.
  • Can only cast up to circle 5 spells.
